rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending "satisfaction-focused" prior work and includes shopper heterogeneity by "customer relationship strength," which aligns closely with the cited paper’s core contribution on satisfaction strength and prior relational experience moderating loyalty outcomes. Given this conceptual overlap (rather than a clearly generic mention) and a verified DOI match, this pair is plausible as a substantive theory/background source and should be retained for full relation judgment.
